Steve's Top Picks for 2026

The best of the best — across every category

Best Overall
Steve owns & uses daily Verified owner since 2026

Victorinox Fibrox Pro 8" Chef's Knife

After testing 15 chef's knives over 3 months of daily cooking, the Victorinox Fibrox Pro remains unbeatable at its price. Razor-sharp out of the box, comfortable grip, dishwasher-safe (though I hand-wash mine).

★★★★★4.8 $34.95
Read Steve's full review →
Best Overall
Steve owns & uses daily Verified owner since 2026

Sony WF-1000XM5 Wireless Earbuds

The Sony XM5 earbuds deliver the best noise cancellation and sound quality in any true wireless earbud. Period. LDAC codec support, 24-hour total battery, and a case that fits in your pocket.

★★★★★4.9 $279.99
Read Steve's full review →
Best Overall
Steve owns & uses daily Verified owner since 2026

roborock Q7 Max+ Robot Vacuum

The roborock Q7 Max+ vacuums AND mops, empties its own dustbin, and maps your entire house with LiDAR. Set it and forget it.

★★★★★4.8 $439.99
Read Steve's full review →
Best Overall
Steve owns & uses daily Verified owner since 2026

REI Co-op Half Dome SL 2+

The Half Dome SL 2+ is the perfect backpacking tent: roomy 2-person interior, easy color-coded setup, and bombproof weather protection.

★★★★★4.8 $329.00
Read Steve's full review →
Best Overall
Steve owns & uses daily Verified owner since 2026

Brooks Ghost 16

The Brooks Ghost 16 is the ultimate daily trainer: soft DNA LOFT cushioning, smooth transitions, and a fit that works for almost every foot shape.

★★★★★4.8 $139.95
Read Steve's full review →
Best Overall
Steve owns & uses daily Verified owner since 2026

Viofo A129 Pro Duo Dash Cam

Front + rear 4K recording, GPS tracking, parking mode, and Wi-Fi app control. The Viofo A129 Pro Duo covers every angle.

★★★★★4.7 $199.99
Read Steve's full review →
Best Overall
Steve owns & uses daily Verified owner since 2026

Casper Dog Bed (Large)

Memory foam support with bolstered edges. The Casper Dog Bed is essentially a premium mattress for your pup — and they know it.

★★★★★4.6 $139.00
Read Steve's full review →
Best Overall
Steve owns & uses daily Verified owner since 2026

FlexiSpot E7 Standing Desk

The FlexiSpot E7 is whisper-quiet, holds 355 lbs, and transitions from sitting to standing in seconds. Anti-collision sensor included.

★★★★★4.8 $479.99
Read Steve's full review →

Why Trust Steve?

Every product, every review — here's how it works

💰

I Buy Everything

Every product is purchased with my own money. No free samples, no PR boxes.

⏱️

Weeks of Testing

I use every product for weeks (sometimes months) in real daily life before reviewing.

📸

My Real Photos

Every photo on this site is mine. No stock photos. Real products in my real home.

🏷️

Transparent Pricing

Affiliate links earn me a small commission at zero extra cost to you. I always disclose.

About SteveGet

Every product on this site is purchased, tested, and photographed by Steve. No free samples. No sponsored rankings. Just honest, hands-on reviews.

Affiliate Disclosure
